rows.label: qev050906_MSG0001
rows.name:
I am truly sorry to have made you come
all the way out here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050906_MSG0002
rows.name:
I request this match knowing full well
that you are the strongest of warriors.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050906_MSG0003
rows.name:
I consider this battle a touchstone to determine...
whether I can truly be reborn as a warrior of some standing![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050906_MSG0004
rows.name: I consider this a trial to determine my worth![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050906_MSG0005
rows.name: As before, there is no need to hold back![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050906_MSG0006
rows.name:
Nothing would make me happier than if you faced me
with the same spirit as a real battle![ST:wait ]
